presentation.title: Program Coach Deck 01 — Why This Business Scales

slides.title: Day 13 — Introduce the Business
slides.body:
Not compensation yet.
Why is this business scalable?
slides.speakerNotes:
Today is about the venture model — not pay plans.
Ask: Why is a financial advisory practice scalable?
discussionQuestions: What makes a business scalable vs a job?

slides.title: The Client Growth Flywheel
slides.body: One client → Referral → Five clients → Twenty clients → Recurring relationships → Growing practice
slides.speakerNotes:
Draw the flywheel.
Emphasize recurring relationships — not one-time transactions.
This is how ventures compound.

slides.title: Recurring Relationships = Recurring Income
slides.body: Service businesses win on retention and referrals.
slides.speakerNotes:
Connect to Week 2 empathy work.
Trust drives referrals. Referrals drive scale.

slides.title: FEC Box 6 — Growth Engines
slides.body: Advisor Excellence · Team & Leadership · Systems & Scale
slides.speakerNotes:
Open Financial Entrepreneurship Canvas Box 6.
Now Growth Engines make sense — they are how your venture scales.
Preview Venture Blueprint Client, Talent, and Leadership engines.
discussionQuestions: Which growth engine will you activate first?
